artist.name: The Weeknd
artist.description: The Weeknd is a Canadian singer, songwriter, and record producer. He is known for his dark, atmospheric music and often explores themes of loneliness, heartbreak, and trauma.

artist.name: Dua Lipa
artist.description: Dua Lipa is an English singer, songwriter, and model. She is known for her powerful voice, catchy pop songs, and bold fashion choices.
